hooks.prompt:
Review the code change for DevOps and CI/CD issues. Check for:
1. Unpinned action versions in GitHub Actions (using @main or @latest instead of @v4)
2. Missing timeout-minutes on GitHub Actions jobs (runaway jobs waste money)
3. Using npm install instead of npm ci in CI/CD pipelines
4. Secrets or credentials hardcoded in workflow files, Dockerfiles, or config
5. Docker containers running as root (missing USER directive)
6. Missing .dockerignore file or node_modules not excluded from Docker build context
7. Missing health check endpoints or HEALTHCHECK in Dockerfile
8. Overly broad GitHub Actions permissions (missing permissions: block)
9. Missing concurrency control on deployment workflows (parallel deploys can conflict)
10. Environment variables with sensitive values logged or exposed in build output

Respond {"ok": true} if no issues found, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue description"} if problems detected.
